reviews.review_msg: Super nice and passionate about her field.

Mary Ellen was a fantastic professor who really opens the door up for people to challenge how they view North American history. She is a very justifiable marker and will provide as much guidance as you need, especially due to the fact that some Indigenous history is not covered or easily accessible. I would take another class with her.
I found her to be an expert on her subject and a good lecturer. Student questions and participation are encouraged, and workload is fair.
John is a chill guy who teaches interesting material and is easy to approach about feedback! Would recommend taking a course with him
SFU is lucky to have Dr. Bird. Genuinely my favorite prof so far– hilarious man, what a gem.

Dr. John Bird is a wonderful professor! He genuinely cares about the subject and the success of his students. He's also very understanding of how busy life gets and will let you write any missing in class assignments during his office hours. I would definitely recommended him if you're taking courses in history or Indigenous studies!
Approachable, lots of readings and class discussion, cares about students, highly recommend.
